summary: Frontend developer with 10+ years spanning digital design, ecommerce delivery, accessibility work and UX-aware web implementation.
Best fit for teams that need strong frontend execution plus design literacy, accessibility awareness, analytics understanding and cross-functional collaboration.

experience.overview: Front-end and ecommerce support across a multi-store Shopify portfolio with a strong focus on UX, branding consistency, product presentation and SEO collaboration.
highlights: Delivered ongoing frontend and design improvements across 15+ Shopify stores, maintaining UX consistency as the portfolio scaled.
Drove layout, brand presentation and web design decisions for customer-facing journeys in direct collaboration with management.
Coordinated SEO-aligned web updates with marketing, improving page quality and search-readiness across the portfolio.

experience.overview: Website operations role covering accessibility, analytics implementation, campaign support, HTML email production and performance reporting.
highlights: Identified, coordinated and tracked accessibility fixes across UAC applications, improving compliance against WCAG standards.
Implemented and maintained Google Tag Manager, Google Analytics, ADvendio and data-layer tracking, including the first data-layer implementation for a UAC application.
Built responsive HTML email templates and contributed to website updates, UTM standards and campaign performance reporting.

experience.overview: Led client work across brand identity, UX/UI, content creation, project management and process design.
highlights: Delivered brand identity, UX/UI and multimedia content across a client portfolio spanning digital, print and motion.
Led projects end-to-end from brief to delivery, managing stakeholders and client communication independently.
Built a broad, implementation-tested foundation in design systems, visual communication and cross-discipline production.

experience.overview: Front-end and UX support across IVE's Web2Print systems and templated client solutions.
highlights: Delivered frontend customisations and UX improvements inside the PageDNA Web2Print environment.
Supported variable-data template workflows and client-specific configuration across a range of accounts.
Contributed HTML and CSS implementation support to the Web2Print team, improving standards and delivery quality.
